description_long: This is a structured, flat-brim snapback cap with a two-tone color scheme: the crown is a dark charcoal gray, while the brim is an olive green. The front panel features a gold embroidered maple leaf outline with a stylized 'C' at its center, giving it a distinctive urban and sporty look. The back of the cap displays another gold embroidered logo, resembling a stylized 'CH' insignia. The cap is constructed from fabric panels with visible stitching and a fabric-covered button at the crown's apex. The side panel includes a small, gold-stitched geometric logo, likely representing the manufacturer. The overall design is clean, modern, and suitable for casual streetwear.
description: A two-tone snapback cap with a dark gray crown, olive green flat brim, and gold embroidered logos on the front, side, and back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold maple leaf and 'C' logo on the dark gray crown with the olive green flat brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the olive brim and a small gold geometric logo on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the gold 'CH' logo centered on the back of the crown.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the plain side panel and the olive brim extending outward.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Maple leaf with 'C', 'CH' insignia, geometric side logo
